agent_review.notes: PRODUCTION-FIDELITY, RICH TASK: claude ran a real 3-step file workflow entirely through the REAL bridge вҖ” 3x mcp__api-bridge__execute_shell_command (read build_id.txt вҶ’ write report.md вҶ’ read it back), each streamed as a ToolCallStartEvent. The build id BUILD_ID_b83c7eae7d12 was only in the file (never the prompt), and report.md on disk is a correct markdown table containing it, proving the write actually happened. The clean stream (Source != terminal) is exactly right: three narration lines interleaved BEFORE each tool ('Reading the project build ID.' / 'Now writing the report table with the build ID.' / 'Reading back the report file.') and a final reply that carries the full markdown table verbatim вҖ” so a no-terminal UI receives the renderable table, no ANSI noise. Clean end to end.
